chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application Nos. 508, 509 & 510 _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) __________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 3050/16 (Ex) 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For orders on CMA No. 3051/16 (stay) 24.12.2025 Mr. Munawwar Ali Memon, advocate for applicant. Per learned counsel, these matters are arising out of remand orders and have been pending since 2016. He is unaware as to the fate of the remand orders and as to whether pursuant thereto the matters have culminated. He states that he tried to seek instructions, however, was unable to do so. In view hereof, Counsel pleads no instructions. Accordingly, these references are dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in the connected files. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
